case_title: JOSE RUTILIO COTO VS. DORA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY COTO, JOSE RUTILIO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-07-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO CURE UNTIMELINESS SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSE RUTILIO COTO. DEFENDANT DORA GARCIA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF COTO, JOSE RUTILIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COTO, JOSE RUTILIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, DORA $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $305.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PLAY PLAINTIFF $250. DEFENDANT AGREED TO RETURN THE DEPOSIT. I OFFSET THE FULL DEPOSIT AMOUNT BY THE VALUE OF THE STORAGE PLAINTIFF RECEIVED IN THE ROOM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $25.00) SERVED NOV-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JOSE RUTILIO COTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DORA GARCIA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
